prose:
Property: Dipole moment (magnitude) in Debye.
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) using xtb 6.x backend, density-functional tight-binding, no Gaussian basis.
Geometry provenance: single-point electrostatics evaluation on the fixed input coordinates provided in methanol.xyz; no geometry optimization performed.
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent model).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (assumed neutral singlet).
Software: xtb via chemkit electrostatics skill.
Convergence & caveats: electronic SCF converged; no warnings from engine. Density-fitting intrinsic to GFN2-xTB. Implicit-only environment; single-conformer calculation.

Headline result: Dipole(moment) = 1.9872799 D.

Live log: the run wrote live output to a timestamped .out file in the caller’s cwd (path was displayed when the calculation started).

Warnings: none reported by the engine.
Integrity check: chemkit reports status ok, trustworthy true; charge-consistency check passed.

This value is computed; no experimental comparison has been attempted in this report.
